titleStmt.title: SII 38.324: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 324. (A.R. No. 324 of 1912.) KARSHAṆAPALLE, PUNGANUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT. On a slab set up in the Arkēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Vijayarāya-uḍaiyār, Year: Śaka 1332, vikṛiti, śu. di. 5, ruler of Muḷvāyil, Thursday, lunar eclipse = 21st March 1309 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged at the end. It records the assignment of a portion of income, accruing to the king from the hamlet Mukkattūr in Vaḍapuli-nāḍu, which was on the way to Muḷvāy-nāḍu, for providing food offerings, as had been done previously, to the god Aṅgakkarēśvaram-uḍaiyanayinār, whose images is said to have been installed by the ruler Śrīvīraobaladēva chōḷa mahārāya. It further records that half of the tax collected went to the god for providing food offerings and worship and the other half to the ruler. It appears that now the whole proceeds of the tax were ordered to be expended by Obaladēva mahārāja, for providing one time food offerings daily, a pair of garlands and a special lamp to the above god on the occasion of lunar eclipse, for the prosperity and comfort of the Lord (śvāmi) Vijayarāya-uḍaiyār, the ruler of Muḷvāyil. The worshipping priest Śivakkōmutti Bhaṭṭar of Bhāradvāja-gōtra made a promise in the presence of the god Aṅgakkarēśvaram-uḍaiyanayinār to conduct the above worship and rituals without fail. Further a portion of the tax Vibhūti-kāṇikkai was also assigned to the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakābdam 1000 4 100 3 10 2 vikiṟuti vaIt appears that the letter ‘va’ is engraved below.-.
ruṣattu caitraścaddha pañcamiyum vā
rattil somagrahaṇapuṇyakālattu
dharmmaśāsanappaṭiyāṉakiṟama yo vane
Eṉṉilattāl coḻamaṇṭalattu vaṭapuli
nāṭṭu muttukūril coḷapraṣṭaiyāna Aṅ
kakkāṟiśvaramuṭaiyanayinārkku pūṟuvat
til Amutupaṭikku Iraṇṭeri kiḻama naṭakku muta
ni kūli4 kollai kūli1 Inta kaḻani ko
llaiyil vāram nayināṟku Amutupaṭikku
ppātiyum nercāvukkup pātiyum celluṅ
kālattil śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvarar śrīvi
rapratāpaṉ vijaiyarāvuṭaiyār muḷvāyil
pratuvirācciyam Āḷuṅkālattil simanmahā
maṇḍalaśvaranti vāralun nna cammaṭa
śrī viraobhaḷa devacoḷa mahārājākka
ḷ muḷvāynāṭṭil cellum vaṭapulināṭ
ṭil muttakkūr namakkuc celluṅkālattil
Inta naāyināṟku pūṟuIt seems that the letter ‘ṟu’ is engraved below. vattil celluṅkol
lai kaḻaniyil vāram pāti nāyanāṟku Amutu
paṭikkuppāti Irācāvukkum cellumpaṭi
yaik keṭṭu somagrahaṇa puṇyakālattil
nammiṭa svāmiyāna vijayarāyavuṭai
yār prathivirācciyam paṇṇi cukameyiruk
ka veṇumeṉṟu Oraṇaimālaiyum mu
tiruviḷakkum Oru nerattil Amutum
cantiracūriyaruḷḷaḷavum naṭattumpaṭik
ku Aṅka(tt)āṟiśvaramuṭaiyanayinār ca
ntiyile bhāradvājagotrattu sivak
komuttipaṭṭar cāmuṇṭitevarai I
nta pūjai tappāmal naṭakkaveṇume
ṉṟu nāyanārait tiṇṭuvittukkoṇ
ṭu nammiṭa yirācapaṇṭārattukku Arum
kolāl kaḻaniyil vāram vipūtikāṇi
kkaiyāka yiṟuttum paṇam Eṭṭil vi
ṭṭa ṇṭārattilum sarvamānniyamāka viṭ
ṭom Ittaṉmam cantiracūriyaruḷḷaḷavu
m naṭakka kaṭavatu Ittaṉmattai keṭut
ta tamatu Uṭaṉpaṭṭavaṉukkum pramā
ma vayai surāpānam staṇ
m karaiṉa mahāpāpam taṉai
kāśitiṟacuttile paṇṇina pāpa
ttai cantirātittavarai naṭattumaḷa
kku gaṅkai godāvari kāsitirtdha
māṭina palaṉpeṟuvarkaḷ 2 Ippa
ṭilokṣasekaranādha devaruṭai
Ippaṭikku cantiraātiyan koṇ
māṇmakaṉ cāmuṇṭi nallam nā
ṉ poṉ ppuṉ Damaged.
Digital edition of SII 38.324 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
